title: Admissions Open for Session 2026-27
description: Admissions are now open for the upcoming academic session. Forms are available at the school office.

title: Summer Camp 2026
description: Registration for the Annual Sports Summer Camp is now open. Events include Cricket, Football, and Athletics.

title: Parent-Teacher Meeting (PTM)
description: The first PTM for the new session will be held on May 2nd. Timing: 9:00 AM to 12:00 PM.
